name: Feature Request

Please outline your proposal for a new feature or enhancement.

### Problem Description
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe what the difficulty is (for example, missing file extensions or custom date formats).

### Proposed Solution
Describe the solution or feature you would like to see added.

### Extra Information
Add any other context, examples, or screenshots about the feature request here.
